input: Run scenario analysis on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected scenario analysis output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the scenario analysis workflow

input: Apply scenario analysis to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive scenario analysis analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to scenario analysis

expected_behavior: Skill handles gracefully — requests minimum viable input or produces gap analysis
